items.claim: Damen Anderson is the best jiu-jitsu player in the UFC.
items.quote: Damen Anderson, for those of you that don't know, is now the best jiujitsu player in the UFC.

items.claim: Damen Anderson has a style similar to Nikki Rodriguez but is a better leg locker.
items.quote: Damen Anderson has a little bit of Nikki Rodriguez in his style and then he's a better leg locker.

items.claim: Ezra Elliot is a better striker than Damen Anderson.
items.quote: Ezra Elliot, who's probably a better striker than Damen Anderson

items.claim: Ezra Elliot missed weight by 1.5 to 2 pounds.
items.quote: He came in pound and a half, two pounds over.

items.claim: Ezra Elliot lacks the cardio for three rounds.
items.quote: I don't know that he has cardio for three rounds.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa is physically stronger than Anna Melisano.
Anna Melisano is too small for the division.
items.quote: Anna Bandana is too small for the grappler that is Dion Barbosa.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is in worse physical condition now than when he was previously on steroids.
R.J. Harris has a significant size advantage over Alvin Hines.
items.quote: 6'2 and R.J. Harris is what? 66? Yeah, 66. Bigger, heavier dude.

items.claim: Steuart Nickel's grappling is not reliable enough for MMA.
items.quote: Steuart Nichols grappling is not reliable enough for me.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has basic jiu-jitsu skills.
items.quote: Felipe Franco's jiu-jitsu looks very basic to me

items.claim: John Paul Leos Noyani is highly skilled at submissions off his back.
items.quote: He's nasty off of his back.

items.claim: Suk Hyung Co is a better wrestler than John Paul Leos Noyani.
items.quote: Hook Co might be the better wrestler here.
